# W/underlabs

> We build tools agents use to ship reliable systems.

W/underlabs is a software lab focused on infrastructure, reliability, and agent systems.

## Pages

- [Home](https://wunderlabs.dev/): Overview of W/underlabs, current focus areas, projects, community, and contact information.
- [Agents](https://wunderlabs.dev/agents/): Placeholder page for agent-oriented content.

## Projects

- Claudebin: Publish Claude Code sessions with a single command and get a shareable link with syntax highlighting, tool calls, and the full conversation thread.
- Openable: Import, run, and edit full generated codebases without installing Node.js, configuring environments, or using the terminal.

## Focus Areas

- Harnesses: Test agent behavior across real workflows, regressions, and long-running tasks with reproducible harnesses.
- Agentic Dev Envs: Run and modify generated codebases in isolated, deterministic environments with zero local setup.
- Human-in-the-Loop: Inspect traces, review tool calls, replay failures, and keep humans involved where reliability matters.

## Contact

- Email: office@wunderlabs.dev
- Website: https://wunderlabs.dev/
